title: Uniface 10: Changes in Configuration Settings
breadcrumbs: What's New in Uniface 10 Compared to Uniface 9
text: Uniface 10: Changes in Configuration Settings A number of changes have been made to assignment settings, initialization settings, and logicals. Search: Column Setting Description Version Filter results... 23 rows found Table 1. New and Changed Assignment Settings Setting Description Version Filter 23 rows found Filter 23 rows found Filter 23 rows found Setting Description Version [NET_SETTINGS] New file section for defining TLS connection profiles and their required keys or certificates. These can be used to configure different TLS connector paths. New in 10.3.01 [WEB] A new file section has been added to the Web Application Server assignment file. If the settings it contains, or their aliases in the [SETTINGS] section, are set multiple times, Uniface will use the last setting it encounters. New in 10.2.01 $CODE_BASE Obsolete due to the removal of web based applet files for static server pages. Obsolete in 10.4.03 $EXIT_TIMEOUT Specifies a time to wait before killing a hanging process. New in 10.3.03 $GENERATE_CMI Enable or disable generation of compiled module information for components when compiling from the command line. New in 10.2.02 $HTML_GENERATION This setting should now be defined in the [WEB] section. The [SETTINGS] location is deprecated (although still accepted). Changed in 10.2.01 $INCLUDE_NOT_FOUND_LEVEL Set the message severity for the compiler message #Include not found . New in 10.3.03 $JS_BASE_URL This setting should now be defined in the [WEB] section. The [SETTINGS] location is deprecated (although still accepted). Changed in 9.7.01 and 10.2.01 $LICENSE_OPTIONS New options have been added to support Sentinel license management Changed in 10.3.03 $MESSAGE_LEVEL Specifies the desired message level for compilation messages (info, warning, or error). New in 10.3.03 $NO_DEBUG Determines whether compiled components and application shells can be debugged (default) or not. Use when compiling components and application shells for release. New in 10.3.03 $PRIV_MON_USER Identifies the privileged user account under which the Uniface Router runs, and which can be used to start and stop Uniface Routers and Servers using the Uniface Router Monitor or the UROUTMON component. Existing setting, now documented $SEARCH_RESOURCES This setting only accepts the value resources_only . The values resources_first , resources_last , and resources_excluded are obsolete because classic deployment is no longer supported. Changed in 10.2.01 $SERVER_SECRET Specifies a unique string to be used as a key in calculating the hash-values used to protect non-editable fields from being modified in a web browser. Replaces $WEBKEY . New in 10.2.01 $SUPPRESS_UNCAUGHT_EXCEPTION_DIALOG When testing an application in batch mode, if an uncaught exception occurs, suppress the dialog that displays the $procerrorcontext information about the cause of the exception. New in 10.4 .02 $UNIFACE_RUNTIME_BASE_URL Specify the URL for JavaScript and CSS files that are used by DSP components. New in 10.2.01 $WEBGEN_X_FOR_DEFAULT This setting should now be defined in the [WEB] section. The [SETTINGS] location is deprecated (although still accepted). Changed in 10.2.01 $WEBGEN_X_ID_DEFAULT This setting should now be defined in the [WEB] section. The [SETTINGS] location is deprecated (although still accepted). Changed in 10.2.01 $WEBGEN_X_ID_INSNAME This setting should now be defined in the [WEB] section. The [SETTINGS] location is deprecated (although still accepted). Changed in 10.2.01 $USP_CHECK_NEW_OCC Determines whether the webget command checks for new occurrences when processing data submitted in a static server page (USP). 10.2.02 $WEB_CODE_BASE​​ Obsolete due to the removal of web based applet files for static server pages. Obsolete in 10.4.03 $WEBKEY Deprecated (although still accepted). Use [WEB]/$SERVER_SECRET instead. Deprecated in 10.2.01 $GRID_READALL_ON_STORECOMPLETE Obsolete because of changes in Grid behavior. Obsolete in 10.1.02 Table 2. New and Changed Initialization Settings Setting Description Version CefRendererCache Specify the number of HTML renderers to remain active and available for reuse in a form component containing many HTML widgets. New in 10.1.02 PaintCache Accelerates screen updates to reduce screen flickering and visual artifacts when displaying, refreshing, or moving forms. New in 10.3.03 RtlAttachMirroring Determines whether attached fields, entities, and area frames are mirrored when running in a right-to-left (RTL) application or form. New in 10.3.03 CellHeight LineSpace Superseded by CellHeight and LineSpace properties, which can be set using the Window setting, or in the window properties of forms. Changed in 10.4 .01.011 Table 3. New and Changed Servlet Settings Setting Description Version TCPKEEPALIVE Specifies whether to keep TCP connections between the Java servlet (SRD or WRD) and the Uniface Router alive to prevent long-running queries and operations from being terminated by idle timeouts. New in 10.3.03 MAXPOSTDATASIZE Specifies the maximum size, in kilobytes, of the content body sent in POST and PUT requests from the client to the server. New in 10.3.03 New Logicals Uniface 10 introduces many new logicals, which are used to control the behavior of the IDE, specify default object templates, influence how ProcScript is migrated from Uniface 9 to Uniface 10, and control the mobile build environment. For more information, see Uniface IDE Logicals and Migration Logicals . Table 4. New and Changed Logicals New/Changed Logical Description Version ALLOW_BROWSE_TEMPLATES Controls whether templates and palettes can be created and edited. New in 10.1.01 AUTOSAVE Controls the time before data is automatically saved New in 10.1.02 AUTOUNLOCK Controls the length of time a lock is held for a transaction in the Uniface IDE. New in 10.1.02 DOCUMENTATION_LOCATION Configures the IDE to use local CHM file instead of online HRML Uniface Library New in 10.3.03 IDETITLE Specify a title to be used in the title bar of the Uniface IDE. Replaces the Uniface 9 logical IDFTITLE . New in 10.3.01 MIGRATION_SCOPEDEFINE Determines whether a constant scope block ( #startdefine and #enddefine ) is added to a migrated, non-empty trigger definition, and to each group of migrated operations. This ensures that scope of these constants is limited to the trigger, and not the code container. New in 10.2.01 New value and default in 10.2.02 MIGRATION_SCRIPT_ADD_INFO Adds a comment at the beginning and end of each migrated ProcScript module with the version 9 trigger name. New in 10.2.01 MIGRATION_SCRIPT_ADD_END Adds an end statement to triggers when required. New in 10.2.01 MIGRATION_SCRIPT_CLEANUP_COMPONENTS Determines whether non-functional code is migrated. In Uniface 9, it was possible for trigger containers to contain code that was not relevant for the component type (such as a detail trigger in a Service) as a result of converting one component to another type. This code was not visible and not compiled into the component. New in 10.2.02 MIGRATION_TRIGGERABBR Determines whether the trigger abbreviation is defined for migrated, non-empty triggers. New in 10.2.01 New value and default in 10.2.02 MIGRATION_SCRIPT_V9_INHERITANCE Determines whether precompiler directives are added to migrated ProcScript modules to break module inheritance and ensure compatibility with Uniface 9 compilation and runtime behavior. New in 10.3.01 Palette logicals Specify the default palette or snippet library to be displayed in the Resource Browser of each editor worksheet. New in 10.1.01 Obsolete Settings and Logicals Table 5. Obsolete Logicals Obsolete Logical Description $REQUIRE_PUBLIC_DECL No longer functional and will generate a warning or error message if it is used. Any trigger or operation that is accessible to the web or via SOAP must be declared as public web or public soap respectively. IDFTITLE Uniface 9 logical replaced by new logical IDETITLE .
